arts.ttl: Select Serie A | Cagliari v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Lazio prepars for their upcoming Serie A match against Cagliari, the team is dealing with the aftermath of their midweek Europa League fixture. Manager Marco Baroni's rotation policy for European games has led to several changes in the lineup, with key players Nicolo Rovella and Mattia Zaccagni unavailable due to suspension. The post Select Serie A | Cagliari v Lazio: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Cagliari vs. Lazio to finish off matchday 23
arts.sum: Lazio are unbeaten in their last 19 Serie A matches against Cagliari (W16 D3), and have never recorded a longer run without defeat against a single opponent in their history in the competition (19 also against Inter, between 1996 and 2005). Lazio are the only side yet to draw away from home in Serie A this term (W6 L5): this is the first time in their history that they have not recorded a single draw across their first 11 away games in a season in the competition.
